name: contextflow
description: ContextFlow - Semantic extraction, diff, and merge for conversational AI

scripts.build: npm run build:core && npm run build:cli
scripts.clean: npm run clean -w @contextflow/core && npm run clean -w contextflow-cli
scripts.test: npm run test -w @contextflow/core && npm run test -w contextflow-cli
scripts.lint: npm run lint -w @contextflow/core && npm run lint -w contextflow-cli
